item.title: Event – BusinessClass F&B Starter Package
item.description: Building an event signup page with partner list management capability # Since this event facilitates the networking between SME bank clients and local startup companies, the list of partners for the event undergoes several changes before being finalized. Therefore, there was a need for a dynamic solution without directly updating many resources at the same time. Within the constraints of the content management software, OpenText CMS, I created a solution which is a JSON file based content management system that updates the partner list table whenever there are changes to the JSON data file.

item.title: Fullstack Booking System
item.description: Building an availability-filling photo studio booking system # With a focus on maximizing utility of available time, the client requested a feature to allow a regular booking of 15-minute duration to “fit” in a 10 minute slot, so that the total number of bookings per day can be maximized. In order to achieve this, I have designed a conditional check for the system to allow 10-minute bookings when all 15-minute slots have been booked.

item.title: Event – Global China Summit 2022
item.description: Building the comprehensive website experience for for a flagship corporate event # By incorporating responsive design and accessibility specifications (e.g. WCAG2) in developing interactive website and registration components, event attendees can experience the full offering of the online event experience. Delivering results while meeting deadlines # To effectively translate documents into HTML code making up the website, I created a tool that enabled a faster development workflow, resulting in large amounts of unorganized information updated on the website in under 1 week’s time.
